title: Tags
description:
A list of unique, essential tags.

**Use**: Used in semantic alignment, search and filtering.

**Guidelines**: Tags should represent the key domain or descriptive aspects of the thing being tagged, based on its definition and content. If no appropriate standard concept is available, use a clear word or short phrase. Avoid overly general or redundant tags.

**Constraints**: *Maximum number* of tags: 10.

name.title: Name
name.description:
A user-friendly tag name.

**Guidelines**: Keep it short, descriptive, and unambiguous. Avoid acronyms unless widely recognised.

**Constraints**: *Maximum length*: 255 characters.

isPrimary.title: Primary
isPrimary.description:
Indicates whether this tag is the primary or most representative tag.

**Guidelines**: Only one tag should typically be marked as the primary tag. Leave unset if no primary tag can be determined.

confidenceScore.title: Confidence Score
confidenceScore.description:
Confidence in tag representativeness.

**Guidelines**: Confidence score assigned by a tagging model or system. Provides a measure of certainty for automatically generated tags. Only include this field for tags generated by an automated process.

**Constraints**: *Range*: [0.0, 1.0].
